children.heading: Product tracing and other requirements
children.label: a Product tracing and other requirements

children.text: any waiver, exception, or exemption pursuant to section 360eee or 360eee–1 of this title; or
any restrictions specified in .section 360eee–1 of this title

children.heading: Wholesale distributor and third-party logistics provider standards
children.label: b Wholesale distributor and third-party logistics provider standards

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Beginning on , no State or political subdivision of a State may establish or continue any standards, requirements, or regulations with respect to wholesale prescription drug distributor or third-party logistics provider licensure that are inconsistent with, less stringent than, directly related to, or covered by the standards and requirements applicable under , in the case of a wholesale distributor, or , in the case of a third-party logistics provider.November 27, 2013section 353(e) of this titlesection 360eee–3 of this title

children.heading: State regulation of third-party logistics providers
children.label: 2 State regulation of third-party logistics providers
children.text: No State shall regulate third-party logistics providers as wholesale distributors.

children.heading: Administration fees
children.label: 3 Administration fees
children.text: Notwithstanding paragraph (1), a State may administer fee collections for effectuating the wholesale drug distributor and third-party logistics provider licensure requirements under sections 353(e), 360eee–2, and 360eee–3 of this title.

children.label: A
children.text: may take administrative action, including fines, to enforce a requirement promulgated by the State in accordance with or this part;section 353(e) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: may provide for the suspension or revocation of licenses issued by the State for violations of the laws of such State;

children.label: C
children.text: upon conviction of violations of Federal, State, or local drug laws or regulations, may provide for fines, imprisonment, or civil penalties; and

children.label: D
children.text: may regulate activities of licensed entities in a manner that is consistent with product tracing requirements under .section 360eee–1 of this title

children.heading: Exception
children.label: c Exception
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed to preempt State requirements related to the distribution of prescription drugs if such requirements are not related to product tracing as described in subsection (a) or wholesale distributor and third-party logistics provider licensure as described in subsection (b) applicable under or this part (or regulations issued thereunder).section 353(e) of this title
